items.title: India has an ‘excellent chance’ of retaining Chess Olympiad title: captain Srinath
items.summary: XLB brief: a fresh sports item from The Hindu Sports, kept short so the page stays scan-first and source-linked.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sooryavanshi, Mayank help India end T20I losing streak
items.summary: India were on top right from the first ball, and ended up with a comfortable seven-wicket win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
items.summary: Football clubs are urged to contribute more to the cost of match policing to ease the burden on taxpayers, as incident figures for the 2025-26 season are published.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
